## 🐛 Bug Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is -->

## 📋 To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen -->

## ❌ Actual Behavior
<!-- What actually happened -->

## 📸 Screenshots
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem -->

## 💻 Environment
**For Mobile App Issues:**
- Device: [e.g. Samsung Galaxy S21]
- OS: [e.g. Android 12]
- App Version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- Flutter Version: [e.g. 3.0.5]

**For Backend Server Issues:**
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Raspberry Pi OS]
- Python Version: [e.g. 3.9.2]
- Server Running On: [e.g. PC, Raspberry Pi 4B]
- Camera Type: [e.g. USB Logitech C270, Raspberry Pi Camera Module V2]

**Network:**
- Connection Type: [e.g. WiFi, Ethernet]
- Network Configuration: [e.g. Same network, Different subnet]

## 📝 Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context about the problem here -->

## 🔍 Error Logs
<!-- If applicable, paste relevant error messages or logs -->
```
Paste error logs here
```

## ✔️ Checklist
- [ ] I have searched for similar issues
- [ ] I have checked the documentation
- [ ] I have provided all relevant information
- [ ] I have included error logs/screenshots
